sources.title: 2023 Internet Crime Report
key_facts: BEC: 21,489 complaints, $2.9B adjusted losses; real estate sector historically targeted
Real Estate crime type: 11,578 complaints, $145.2M losses (2023)
Stamford CT BEC closing case: $426K wire, $425K recovered via FFKC
Wire complainant guidance: contact bank immediately, file ic3.gov, verify changes out-of-band

sources.title: Rental Listing Scams
key_facts: Hijacked listings: scammers copy photos/descriptions, replace contact info
Phantom listings: below-market rent, unavailable landlord, pressure to pay quickly
Never wire/Zelle/crypto before viewing unit or signing lease
Investigate: address+owner search, reverse image search, in-person verification
Report: local LE, listing platform, ReportFraud.ftc.gov

sources.title: Mortgage Relief Scams
key_facts: MARS Rule: illegal to charge upfront before written lender offer accepted
Deed transfer schemes: scammers pressure homeowners to transfer deed with rent-back promise
Upfront fee + deed transfer + no lender contact = documented rescue fraud pattern

sources.title: Deed theft / home equity theft enforcement frameworks
key_facts: CA Civil Code §§2945.4–2945.9: Home Equity Theft Prevention Act
Multi-victim ring indicators: shared registered agent, pattern notary, paid-off targeting
